author: Sofia Martínez
title: AI Video Marketing for Local Businesses: From Script to Publish in 90 Minutes
description: AI video tools have collapsed the production timeline for local business video content. Here's how to produce consistent video marketing without a production team.

sections.p: Video has been the highest-engagement content format for years, but production cost and time kept most local businesses out of it. AI video tools have removed both barriers. A local business can now go from idea to published video in under 2 hours, at a quality level that would have required a half-day shoot and a full-day edit in 2022.

Step 1: Script with Claude — a 60-second video script takes 10 minutes with AI assistance. Step 2: Record the founder or a team member reading the script, or use an AI avatar for businesses that prefer not to be on camera. Step 3: edit with AI tools like Descript or CapCut AI — automatic captions, b-roll suggestions, and noise removal. Step 4: publish across YouTube, Instagram Reels, and TikTok simultaneously. Total time: 90 minutes.

sections.h2: Video formats that drive the most local business results

list: Process walkthroughs: 'how we do [service]' — builds trust and eliminates objections before a sales conversation.
FAQ videos: top 5 questions your prospects ask, answered on camera — these rank in Google video search.
Client results: brief client testimonial with before/after, permission granted — highest-converting video type.
Local authority content: 'our take on [local topic relevant to your industry]' — positions you as the area expert.

sections.p: YouTube is the second-largest search engine and one of the lowest-competition channels for local business video content. Most local businesses have zero YouTube presence. A plumber who publishes 20 how-to videos owns their local market on YouTube for years, with each video generating referral traffic to their website indefinitely.

sections.h2: AI avatars for camera-shy business owners

sections.p: Not every business owner wants to be on camera, and that's no longer a barrier to video marketing. AI avatar tools can create a consistent video presenter using either a stock avatar or a one-time recording of the owner. The result is professional, consistent video content without requiring anyone to be in front of a camera repeatedly.

sections.quote: The local business with a YouTube library of 30 helpful videos never competes for leads. It attracts them.
